_comment: Copy to autonomy.config.json at your repo root and tune. The loop, hook, and prompts read every knob from here. autonomy.config.json is gitignored (per-checkout).

models._comment: Cost control. Reviewer CRITICS default cheap; only the escalation Judge is Opus. See README Cost.

gate.build: <your build command, or empty if none>
gate.lint: <your lint command, or empty if none>
gate.comment_frozenInvariant: What must stay BYTE-IDENTICAL unless a human re-baselines — golden/snapshot tests, a recorded API contract, etc. Empty if none.

comment_protectedPaths: Edits AND bash-writes (rm/mv/cp/redirect) to these are blocked by the hook. Substrings.
gateList: Drift the frozen invariant without a human re-baseline.
Fabricating data (every number carries N+CI or 'building — N/30').
honestyRule: No fabricated numbers. Every rate carries N + a confidence interval, or says 'building — N/30'. A capability with no real data abstains visibly — never faked, never silently dead.
_example: Real-world shape: a Next.js app used workBranch 'agent-loop', a set of golden snapshot tests as the frozen invariant, and protectedPaths ['test/golden/'].
